steps.title: Substitute the y-coordinate
steps.content:
The intersection point is $(q,17)$, so $y=17$ in both equations.
$$-x-17w=-249$$
$$2x-17w=39$$

steps.title: Eliminate w first
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second equation.
$$(2x-17w)-(-x-17w)=39-(-249)$$
$$3x=288$$
$$x=96$$
